title: rubus pallens
intro: Rubus pallens, also known as the pale bramble, is a type of thorny shrub belonging to the Rosaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Rubus pallens include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as aiding in wound healing and protecting against infections. The herbal preparations of Rubus pallens include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make topical applications and internal remedies for various health issues.
